title: Chewy Vegetarian-friendly Tofu Fajita Wraps
description: A brunch-mood Venezuelan dish featuring fajita seasoning, caramelized tofu in a vegeteirian-friendly wrap with an authentic taste and texture reminiscent of traditional fajitas.

ingredients.name: bell peppers
ingredients.notes: Any color you prefer, but try to use fresh if possible.

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: For frying tofu and cooking vegetables.

instructions: Press the tofu with paper towels to remove excess water.
Season the tofu with fajita seasoning and a pinch of salt. Let it marinate for at least 10 minutes.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Cook sliced bell peppers, onions, and zucchini (if using) until they start to soften and brown slightly on all sides.
Add the seasoned tofu cubes to the pan with vegetables. Continue cooking until the tofu is golden brown and crispy on all sides.
Transfer the cooked fajita filling to a warm plate or bowl for serving.
Assemble the wraps by placing a piece of warmed tortilla, adding a generous portion of the grilled fajitas filling onto it.
